user_message: Give me the manager view on this Nod Publishers exec meeting notes. Not urgent but would be good to have by EOD.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Samantha Singh <samantha.singh@nodpublisher.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-11 16:24 EST
Subject: Follow-up: forecast prep Review

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with forecast prep. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Samantha Singh <samantha.singh@nodpublisher.com>
Date: 2024-01-28 08:10 EST
Subject: Follow-up: forecast prep Review

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with forecast prep. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF40-D trap (Forecast category proposed without milestone evidence); produces complete Commitment assessment, BPF advance verdict, milestone proposal, forecast category recommendation, ac
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF40-D failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF40-D failure mode (Forecast category proposed without milestone evidence)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct forecast prep decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF40-D -- Forecast category proposed without milestone evidence
